=== Azure VM Pricing Estimate ===
VM:       Standard_E4-2as_v7
OS:       Windows
Region:   Australia East

--- PAYG (Pay-as-you-go) ---
Per VM:  USD 0.4840/hr  |  USD 353.32/month
AHB PAYG: USD 219.00/month  (save 38% vs Windows PAYG RRP)

--- Savings Plan (flexible, compute discount only) ---
License: USD 134.32/month  (at RRP, no discount)

1-Year Savings Plan  (~33% compute discount):
  Compute: USD 146.73/month  (discounted)
  License: USD 134.32/month  (at RRP)
  Total:   USD 281.05/month

3-Year Savings Plan  (~53% compute discount):
  Compute: USD 102.93/month  (discounted)
  License: USD 134.32/month  (at RRP)
  Total:   USD 237.25/month

--- Reserved Instances (vs PAYG) ---
1-Year RI  (save 25%):
  Per VM:  USD 263.32/month  (USD 129.00 compute + USD 134.32 Win license)
3-Year RI  (save 38%):
  Per VM:  USD 217.43/month  (USD 83.11 compute + USD 134.32 Win license)

--- Azure Hybrid Benefit (compute rate only, no Windows license) ---
(Requires existing Windows Server licenses with Software Assurance)
PAYG + HB:      USD 219.00/month  (save 38% vs Windows PAYG RRP)
1-Year RI + HB: USD 129.00/month  (save 63% vs Windows PAYG RRP)
3-Year RI + HB: USD 83.11/month  (save 76% vs Windows PAYG RRP)

=== Storage ===
OS disk  : Premium SSD P10 (128 GiB) — USD 19.71/month
Storage subtotal: USD 19.71/month
Default OS disk shown — ask to change the tier/size or add data disks.

All prices are Microsoft Retail RRP. CSP pricing would be lower.
Monthly estimates based on 730 hours.
